title: Deep Active Inference and Scene Construction.

assets.abstract: Adaptive agents must act in intrinsically uncertain environments with complex latent structure. Here, we elaborate a model of visual foraging-in a hierarchical context-wherein agents infer a higher-order visual pattern (a "scene") by sequentially sampling ambiguous cues. Inspired by previous models of scene construction-that cast perception and action as consequences of approximate Bayesian inference-we use active inference to simulate decisions of agents categorizing a scene in a hierarchically

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.
